commit.subject: LU-5788 test: debug log
commit.message:
LU-5788 test: debug log

Debug log to ouput more logs.

Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientcount=4 osscount=2 \
austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 \
testlist=recovery-double-scale,recovery-double-scale,recovery-double-scale
